title: Creamy Slovakian Rainbow Trout Stew
description: A rich and flavorful pescatarian dish featuring rainbow trout, score-fat, and fermented ingredients, cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel.
instructions: Heat the score-fat in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the rainbow trout fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the trout from the vessel and set aside.
Add the sour cream, fermented sauerkraut, caraway seeds, and paprika to the vessel, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until heated through.
Return the trout to the vessel and spoon some of the creamy sauce over the top of each fillet.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
